title: Mountain Rescue Relays: A Uniform 3D Relay Grid
strategies: diagonal / single-line placement: relays on the cube's main diagonal (matches the checker baseline, high 3D star discrepancy ~0.38-0.42)
Hammersley set in 3D: first coordinate (i+0.5)/m, remaining two = radical inverses in bases 2 and 3 (reliable single fixed low-discrepancy construction)

rank-1 Korobov lattice search: sweep the generating vector (1,a,a^2 mod m) and a per-axis shift over a in 1..m-1, keep the candidate with minimum EXACT 3D discrepancy (a real search that beats a single fixed construction)
jittered/stratified cube grids, Fibonacci-style lattices, or local coordinate-perturbation refinement of a good seed set
